summary: A calm, premium, mid-century-meets-future editorial illustration built from simplified architecture, sweeping infrastructure curves, and layered geometric landforms. The image feels civic, architectural, and slightly technological without becoming glossy or cyberpunk.

composition.structure: panoramic scene with a large stepped building on the left-centre, vertical framing forms on the right, and flowing road/data-like ribbons moving through the foreground and midground
composition.balance: asymmetrical but controlled, with heavier mass on the left offset by tall curved forms and spire elements on the right
depth_strategy: foreground ribbon-like roads and cutaway shapes
background silhouettes, hills, and simplified landmark structures
composition.spatial_logic: flattened perspective with stacked planes rather than realistic depth
focal_points: cathedral or civic spire on the right
glowing curved route lines crossing the middle-right area
composition.negative_space: cream-coloured breathing room around and between clustered forms
composition.cropping_behavior: elements extend to the frame edges in a poster-like way, but the scene still feels contained and composed

geometry_traits: curves used to soften otherwise rigid architecture
shape_language.line_quality: mostly crisp vector edges with occasional thin linear detailing
motif_types: stone or pebble textures in bounded sections

usage_notes.darks: used for structure, framing, windows, roads, and contrast anchors
usage_notes.lights: used for background, building faces, and visual breathing room
usage_notes.warm_accents: used sparingly to create rhythm and guide the eye
usage_notes.cool_accents: used in route bands and atmospheric layers

materials_and_texture.texture_intensity: light to medium, enough to avoid flat digital sterility
materials_and_texture.rendering_feel: vector-based forms with analogue print softness
materials_and_texture.shadow_treatment: minimal, mostly implied by tonal layering rather than cast shadow realism
materials_and_texture.lighting: diffuse and even, with occasional glow accents

architectural_detail: thin contour details on landmark structures
pattern_usage: pebble or terrazzo-like infill in bounded sections
fine parallel striping in vents and paths
small dash clusters suggesting lights or interface marks
detail_language.abstraction_level: high enough to feel stylised, low enough to remain legible as a place

mood_and_tone.emotional_read: a city or civic environment imagined as elegant, ordered infrastructure with culture and memory embedded into it

do: use simplified civic and architectural forms
blend hard geometry with sweeping curves
maintain a premium editorial poster feel
use terracotta accents sparingly against cool teals and creams
do_not: overcrowd the composition with tiny details
make it cute, comic, or playful

remove_or_avoid: any bottom-right corner emblem or signature glyph
exclusions.note: The decorative star or Gemini-style symbol in the bottom-right corner should not be repeated or regenerated.

reference_asset.note: This is the canonical reference image for this style. The Gemini watermark that originally appeared in the bottom-right corner has been removed. Use this file as the visual benchmark when generating or commissioning new assets.

prompt_ready_description: Create a wide retro-futurist civic landscape illustration with a stepped modernist building, a cathedral-like spire, castle-like linework, layered hills, terraces, and sweeping road or data-ribbon curves. Use a muted palette of warm ivory, deep teal, dusty sage, powder blue, and restrained burnt terracotta. Keep the composition architectural, geometric, and calm, with subtle grain and soft airbrushed tonal transitions. The style should feel like a premium mid-century editorial poster crossed with modern infrastructural concept art. No logos, no signature marks, and no star or sparkle symbol in the corner.
